productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Goodyear Driver Vulc White Casual Shoes
description: The Goodyear Driver Vulc is a low profile driving shoe from adidas originals, and comes with a new vulcanised design that is reminiscent of old school outsoles. With a low profile silhouette, this shoe works great for casual wear too.UpperFull grain leather upper with adidas patented 3-Stripes and strategically placed overlays for comfort and soft feelLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleMoulded midsole detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with vulcanized tire-inspired design for a low profile and maximum traction Shoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlightWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
